title: North Bay NEXT: Eric Ries Discusses Incorruptible with Semafor's Reed Albergotti
summary: Eric discusses Incorruptible three weeks before its public release at the fifth annual North Bay NEXT conference at College of Marin in Novato, in conversation with Semafor's Reed Albergotti. 300+ founders, investors, and executives.
blockquote: Topping it all off will be Eric Ries, author of The Lean Startup, discussing his new book Incorruptible three weeks before its public release, in discussion with Semafor's Reed Albergotti. This is a community gathering — all NEXT speakers are our neighbors, living across Marin and Sonoma and committed to driving forward a more robust entrepreneurial ecosystem North of the Golden Gate Bridge.
blockquote_source: Zachary Kushel, Marin Sonoma Impact Ventures
